---
title: "Repeated Games"
short-title: "Repeated Games"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Finite and infinite horizon games, the folk theorem, and trigger strategies."
keywords: ["repeated games", "folk theorem", "trigger strategies", "discount factor"]
---

# Repeated Games {#sec-repeated-games}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
